Name: Parse CSV
Description: Parses CSV text into an array of records.

SettingsInputs.Name: SourceAddress
SettingsInputs.Description: State address of the CSV text to parse

SettingsInputs.Name: HasHeaders
SettingsInputs.Description: When true, first row is used as field names

SettingsInputs.Name: Destination
SettingsInputs.Description: State address to store parsed records

SettingsInputs.Name: QuoteCharacter
SettingsInputs.Description: Character used to quote fields containing the delimiter

SettingsInputs.Name: SkipEmptyLines
SettingsInputs.Description: Skip empty lines in the input
